title: 在线课程付费转化漏斗分析
subtitle: 浏览 → 试学 → 加购 → 付费 → 完课
businessGoal: 找到转化卡点，提升付费率

chapters.title: 漏斗数据概览
chapters.content: 浏览→试学→加购→付费→完课，观察每阶段人数。

codeExamples.title: 表
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-funnel.csv')
print(df)

chapters.title: 单漏斗图
chapters.content: 用柱状图展示整体漏斗。

codeExamples.title: 漏斗
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-funnel.csv')
total = df[df['channel']=='总计'].copy()
print(total)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8,4))
ax.bar(total['stage'], total['users'], color='#2563eb')
for i, u in enumerate(total['users']):
    ax.text(i, u, str(u), ha='center', va='bottom')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

selfCheckQuestions.question: 柱高表示每阶段通过用户数。

chapters.title: 渠道对比与转化卡点
chapters.content: 通过 pivot_table 形成宽表后做渠道 × 阶段归一化柱状图。

codeExamples.title: 对比
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-funnel.csv')
pv = df.pivot_table(index='channel', columns='stage', values='users')
print(pv)
pv_norm = pv.div(pv['浏览'], axis=0)
pv_norm.T.plot(kind='bar', figsize=(9,5))
plt.ylabel('相对浏览的转化率'); plt.title('各渠道漏斗转化率'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

exercises.prompt: 输出相对于上一阶段的转化率。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-funnel.csv')
total = df[df['channel']=='总计'].copy()
exercises.sampleAnswer:
total['conv'] = total['users'].pct_change() + 1
total.loc[total.index[0], 'conv'] = 1.0
total['conv'] = total['conv'].map(lambda v: f'{v:.2%}')
print(total[['stage','users','conv']])

exercises.prompt: 绘制各渠道付费用户数柱状图。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-funnel.csv')
hints: 筛选 stage=='付费'，再 plot(x='channel', kind='bar')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
paid = df[df['stage']=='付费']
paid.plot(kind='bar', x='channel', y='users', color='#f97316', figsize=(9,4), legend=False)
plt.ylabel('付费用户数'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

exercises.prompt: 找到 “付费→完课” 转化率最低的渠道。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-funnel.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
pv = df.pivot_table(index='channel', columns='stage', values='users')
pv['c'] = pv['完课']/pv['付费']
res = pv['c'].sort_values()
print('最低渠道:', res.index[0], f' ({res.iloc[0]:.2%})')

quizzes.question: 可对不同渠道分别画漏斗以对比。
归一化到浏览阶段最直接用？

finalExam.question: 某渠道试学→加购转化率低，可能需改进试学体验。
